SEARCH
Module com.renomad.minum
Package com.renomad.minum.utils

Interface IFileUtils

All Known Implementing Classes:
FileUtils
public interface IFileUtils
This interface allows us to mock out many of the I/O methods of the framework for easier testing of IOExceptions.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    checkFileIsWithinDirectory(String path, String directoryPath)
    This method is to provide assurance that the file specified by the path parameter is within the directory specified by directoryPath.

    A wrapper around Files.delete(Path)

  • Method Details

    • writeString

      void writeString(Path path, String content, OpenOption... options) throws IOException
      A wrapper around Files.writeString(Path, CharSequence, OpenOption...)

      Note: This does *not* protect against untrusted data on its own. Call safeResolve(String, String) first against the path to ensure it uses valid characters and prevent it escaping the expected directory.

      Throws:
      UtilsException - if an empty path is provided
      IOException

    • write

      Path write(Path path, Iterable<? extends CharSequence> lines, Charset cs, OpenOption... options) throws IOException
      A wrapper around Files.write(Path, Iterable, Charset, OpenOption...)
      Throws:
      IOException

    • readString

      String readString(Path path) throws IOException
      A wrapper around Files.readString(Path)
      Returns:
      the value of the file at the path parameter, as a string, presuming UTF-8 encoding
      Throws:
      UtilsException - if an empty path is provided
      IOException

    • deleteDirectoryRecursivelyIfExists

      void deleteDirectoryRecursivelyIfExists(Path myPath) throws IOException
      Deletes a directory, deleting everything inside it recursively afterwards. A more dangerous method than many others, take care.

      Note: This does *not* protect against untrusted data on its own. Call safeResolve(String, String) first against the path to ensure it uses valid characters and prevent it escaping the expected directory.

      Throws:
      IOException

    • makeDirectory

      void makeDirectory(Path directory) throws IOException
      Creates a directory if it doesn't already exist.

      Note: This does *not* protect against untrusted data on its own. Call safeResolve(String, String) first against the path to ensure it uses valid characters and prevent it escaping the expected directory.

      Throws:
      IOException

    • readBinaryFile

      byte[] readBinaryFile(String path) throws IOException
      Read a binary file, return as a byte array

      Note: This does *not* protect against untrusted data on its own. Call safeResolve(String, String) first against the path to ensure it uses valid characters and prevent it escaping the expected directory.

      This calls to IFileReader.readFile(String) for its work, and that method calls to FileUtils.checkForBadFilePatterns(String) to ensure the requested method is definitely in the allowed directory, and not escaping it using characters like ".." or "//".

      Also, IFileReader.readFile(String) uses the LRUCache to cache data.

      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the path is blank
      IOException

    • readAllLines

      List<String> readAllLines(Path path) throws IOException
      A wrapper around Files.readAllLines(Path)
      Throws:
      IOException

    • readTextFile

      String readTextFile(String path) throws IOException
      Read a text file from the given path, return as a string.

      Note: This does *not* protect against untrusted data on its own. Call safeResolve(String, String) first against the path to ensure it uses valid characters and prevent it escaping the expected directory.

      This calls to IFileReader.readFile(String) for its work, and that method calls to FileUtils.checkForBadFilePatterns(String) to ensure the requested method is definitely in the allowed directory, and not escaping it using characters like ".." or "//".

      this uses the LRUCache to cache data.

      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the path is blank
      IOException

    • checkFileIsWithinDirectory

      void checkFileIsWithinDirectory(String path, String directoryPath) throws IOException
      This method is to provide assurance that the file specified by the path parameter is within the directory specified by directoryPath. Use this for any code that reads from files where the user provides untrusted input.
      Throws:
      ForbiddenUseException - if the file is not within the directory
      IOException

    • safeResolve

      Path safeResolve(String parentDirectory, String path) throws IOException
      This helper method will ensure that the requested path is within the parent directory and using safe characters
      Throws:
      IOException

    • delete

      void delete(Path path) throws IOException
      A wrapper around Files.delete(Path)
      Throws:
      IOException

      void move(Path source, Path target, CopyOption... options) throws IOException
      A wrapper around Files.move(Path, Path, CopyOption...)
      Throws:
      IOException
